title: Better Experience+
description: A modpack built off Geek's Great Pack, but modified to be a V+ modpack.
body:
# Into to the modpack

This is a modpack built off of "Geek's Great Pack" (which was also made by me) but it takes away all of the RPG like elements and makes it into more of a V+ Experience. The mods include many QOL mods, good world gen, little more progression, and much, much more.

## Some of the mods in this modpack
some of the mods include:
- Additional Structures
- BetterEnd
- BetterNether
- Many world gen mods
- Dungeons and Taverns
- True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul
- And many of the Sodium like mods
